review_text: This park was amazing. Such a beautiful place next to the river and so green .This made for some good quality family time on some of the meney walks and trails around the area. The management was friendly and so helpful. The aminites are well maintained as are the grounds. I would recommend for a family or solo trip .Loved my stay and will be back soon . Thankyou  to the management for a great holiday

I stayed in one of the cabins for a weekend, early this year and when I arrived at check in time my room didn't have access for me. I called multiple times without success and I left several messages, all of which didn't receive a response. I started to worry late in the afternoon that I wouldn't get access for the night, which made me aware that I should look for alternative accommodation. All the food in my cold bag spoilt because they weren't in a fridge. Eventually someone arrived after 4:30 and gave me access.
Amazing. I would come back.
Visiting friend at caravan park, nice
A lovely little caravan park with great facilities. A very enjoyable stay!

We booked online and stayed for 2 nights the day after arriving the managers approached us saying we hadn’t booked which we had and was sent the information for check in. After that I kinda felt uncomfortable staying, the park was clean and great location on the river although hand soap wasn’t refilled in the ladies bathrooms regularly and guests purchased hand soap and placed it in the bathroom for all to use because of the lack of any from managers.
I wouldn’t agree you politely enquired, you walked past saying I need to chat to to you guys, me confused you said you haven’t booked is that right than said you’d come back, on return you queried when we arrived and when we were leaving and how we booked, as far as I’m aware we booked for the accurate number of guests but if a error was made and you had of advised us we would of been happy to rectify this.

Satisfactory camping spots, no view to river though, walkable access.  Kitchen with fridge, freezer, microwave and sink.  Clean with hot and cold water.  B.Y.O. dinner set and gas or electric portable stove.
Friendly very helpful staff, easy check in, sites level & easy park up.  All instructions clear & easy to follow. Lovely place to stay & will stay here again & would highly recommend.

my sister and i came and stay 3 days at your caravan park, we stayed in a cabin last month, we both enjoyed our stay and we told our family about the park, very nice place for adults and children, very close to the shops,  Mary

We had another lovely stay here this weekend. The park is always clean, well looked after, and has such a relaxed, welcoming, stress free feel.

The facilities were clean and maintained daily, easy to use, and close in proximity.
The management are genuinely lovely, easy going people. We’ve stayed a few times now and it’s consistently a great experience.

Beautiful views of the river, our kids had plenty to do, they didn’t want to leave!

Definitely a place we’ll keep coming back to.

Great park, clean and well maintained, awesome location and really helpful managers.

Had a great time, perfect for younger families with plenty of activities for the kids and very peaceful. The park also offers really nice amenities, bbq area’s ect

very much enjoyed our stay and definitely recommend.
Great little park right on the river. Easy walk into town. We loved it.

Beautiful new cabins overlooking the Avon River. Stayed one night and enjoyed the friendly and informative service from the park hosts. Very rested for the drive the next day and enjoyed the comfy bed. One of the best spots to stop in Gippsland.

Beautiful setting
Shame the amenities are not cleaned each day we stay more than a week and counted as least 5 days before cleaning and bins emptied
Same as camp kitchen no daily cleaning microwave and BBQ area disgusting
Soap dispenser was not working on and off for over week
Shower furthest from door drain was blocked
These thing where reported to inchatge people with no response very disappointed

Stayed one night at Stratford caravan park on a large drive through site near ammenties.
Enjoyed our stay and will be back.  Had a lovely hamburger and chips nearby on Highway called "Grill'd" HSP. Yummy burgers!

We stayed in a nicely located brandnew River View cabin which looked perfect at first glance but there are letdowns. Although it says fully self-contained, there is only a microwave and a (dirty) BBQ on the veranda, but no stove inside. Storage for clothing or bags basically missing, there are not even hooks on walls for your jacket. Also, there are no flyscreens on windows, so you can choose between suffocating or being eaten alive by mozzies in the night. This is a must in Australia. Finally, who needs all these ugly artificial plants everywhere at such wonderful natural location. And an ice cube tray would be nice in the freezer. Overall, there is room for improvement.
What a beautiful park! Perfect location, wonderful facilities. I had a premium powered site and it was so beautiful I extended my stay an extra night! Will be back for sure!

This park is implementing a contact less experience and that’s exactly what we got.  No phone answered, no one in the office, self guided book in (pick your own site)    On site manager has not got a smile in him. Yes, been there before and I agree with price gouging.  Book on line and up front pay for entire stay instead of one nights deposit.   Love the park, dislike the way it’s run.

Very disappointing with no interaction with the staff.  Poison was sprayed around our caravan site while we were sitting there with our dogs. 😡 we said it wasn’t appropriate or appropriate using Roundup around our dogs.|People were told to shut their dogs up and they have been barking all day. Well the dogs were not in the park until after lunch as we spent the morning at the river and when we got back they slept until 5:30 ish. Then they were barking for approximately 10 minutes while the owners were preparing their dinner. No barking for the rest of the night.  Now how about you look in your back yard and stop your dog from barking all day.|Toilet and showers were dirty  all the time. They moped the floor once in 4 days   Hair etc floating around in shower. Disgusting. dog wash was full of cobwebs.

What a lovely, friendly,  clean caravan park which is situated next to the Avon River.
Its quiet and the sites are spacious.
The amenities are old but clean.
There is also a dog wash.
We were only going to stay 1 night and ended up staying for 2.

Very poor management and rudeness and attitude.  Very rude approach towards people. Do not recommend this Starty Carvan Park to anyone that’s need permanent accommodation with caravans or 58 days stay. Not a very good management but a very good caravan park. A complaint has been emailed.

This caravan park is a gem.  Beautiful gardens and nestled right on the Avon River.  We had never ventured to Gippsland before so we were pleasantly surprised. From the moment we arrived, the Managers, Danny and Yvette, made us feel special.  They went above and beyond to help us navigate our stay.  We stayed  in a very comfortable cabin, which had all the amenities we needed including a view of the Avon River.   The caravan park itself, apart from the wonderful amenities,  is walking distance to the pub, cafe and take away venues, which makes life very easy when travelling. Also the public pool is situated at your door step, very convenient on hot days. We also went for day trips to beautiful destinations all within an hours drive, including Paynesville, Maffra, Metung and Lakes Entrance. So much to do.
We so look forward to our next visit as this destination is a must see on anyones bucket list

Beware: Jack jumper ants on site here along the river side sites. I am allergic (anaphylactic) but when we alerted management, they'd never heard of them and didn't seem too phased. It was not safe for me to stay here (I'd end up in hospital if bitten just once) so we left immediately after seeing a few ants, and one of the kids getting bitten. Head office refused a refund as well, and even suggested management couldn't locate any ants so therefore there was no need for concern. Which seeing as management had never heard of them is not surprising.As these ants are on the rise in VIC and dangerous to human safety I found their response pretty terrible and not acceptable. Aside from this, the caravan park is uninspiring place next to a river but the bank is weedy and you cannot get down to the water. It's also by the main road so think trucks rolling by all night. It's clean, and we would have stayed for the one night on our way home if it had been safe but seeing the response was so crap I would advise others to avoid.
Lovely quiet caravan park. Clean and easily accessible amenities and friendly managers.

Brand New unit. Very compact, but comfortable.good location. There's no hairdryer, no milk in the fridge and All the chanels on the TV kept losing signals. I thought it was a bit pricey for small unit.

Lovely clean site , near river , peaceful.
Older amenities but clean.
Good spread of picnic tables along river bank.

Never stay there again, tiny rooms, absolutely horrible,
No table to do work on, night mare,,
Good luck in the future,
You will lose clients,

This was our first time staying at the park. We absolutely loved every minute of it. The countless walks, the water, the atmosphere.
Bonus having the council pool out the front.

We will absolutely be coming back
What a lovely caravan park with shady powered sites, perfect facilities and pet friendly. We will definitely return, looking forward to next time 🙂
Awesome little caravan park sites nice and grassy, amenities were spotless, owners couldn’t be more helpful. Supplied us with some kindling and fire pit for the night will be back again
Had an amazing time staying in one of the cabins. It was modern, clean and comfortable. Danny and Yvette were very helpful with local information. Would highly recommend!

We absolutely loved our time at the Stratford caravan park, so much so we stayed an extra night because it was so relaxing. Our shipping container converted into a gorgeous tiny home was beautiful with all the mod con features you could ask for and a very modern colour palette and finishings, and the bed was the best sleep we have had in years. Nestled right beside the river, the tranquility just relaxes you instantly. Thankyou Danny & Yvette for a wonderful stay at your park . Bob & Tanya OBrien
Quiet little park with very friendly staff, clean facilities and nice atmosphere. Had fun meeting other travellers. Great set off point for the cycle to Taralgon.
Great caravan park and fantastic town. Loved the pub!!!! Loved the town.

I had my family and freinds stay here and the Carvan park was super helpful to have us all together and the park was clean and well set out.

Cant recommend enough
The park was quiet for the time spent here but it was lovely and green and very well kept. Toilets were modern and clean and I would stay here again without any hesitation.
A great little park, close to town and a good base to explore the area

Loved my time here. Park is maintained and is getting regular updates by Danny & Yvette. You can expect and receive lovely clean facilities, new cabins with great decks to enjoy the view over the river, and/or well positioned camping/caravan sites. Cool off in the Avon river or just enjoy the many bird species that frequent the area.
Comfy, cosy. Enjoy
Very rude and disgusting customer service from danny never again ever 😤
A great place to stay. Well positioned for riding the Gippsland Plains Rail Trail as well as exploring other areas in Gippsland.

A lovely small park, offering everything we needed for the weekend. Easy access to the Main Street, and a fabulous location to explore the beauty of the region. Booking and check in process was super easy, and fabulous instructions via email on the morning of our arrival. Highly recommend.

Nous avons passé 6jours dans ce camping et c'était parfait pour pouvoir nous reposer et faire à manger facilement,  il a un bon emplacement et ses gérants sont fiables et sympa !
Nous recommandons.

Mateo & Elisa

Absolutely outstanding! Stratford Caravan Park exceeded all our expectations.  The venue itself is beautiful and incredibly well-maintained, making it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy the surroundings.
What really made our stay unforgettable were the owners, they are simply amazing. So friendly, welcoming, and genuinely accommodating. They went above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed and felt right at home.
If you're looking for a peaceful, clean, and well-run park with fantastic hosts, look no further. We'll definitely be back!

Thanks for a amazing group trip!
Definitely a gem waiting to be found.

I have a van with power. So I got to use a a beautiful grassy place right near the river. The camp kitchen had two tables and benches so I  could have a place out of the sun. It had a toaster, microwave, jug, fridge and electric frypan. Lots of useful pamphlets and maps were also available in here. There is a covered BBQ area and you are 5 mins walk from town. Fantastic! The owners are lovely.
Beautiful place, lovely location, quiet and easy access for caravan parking.
Super friendly service and an awesome location

Stayed at this caravan park late Aug 2025
Peaceful park near Avon river amenities block very old but reasonably modern & clean inside
however toilets are very cramped but showers well and truly make up for it as they were very spacious,clean & great hot showers with plenty of water pressure. Also nearby a great rail trail ride to Maffra

We have stayed several times here this time it is a credit to new managers owners we stayed in our caravan but the park is a credit to them, clean new cabins well maintained and looks like more to come great stay
Great little park, on River, (but without access). Clean and quiet when we were there. Enjoyed the fire pit at night. Very relaxing!
Great service 👏
Amenities were extremely clean, lovely quiet and large site. Easy going managers. Highly recommend this place to explore surrounding areas
Great place with great views

A great little park run by a gem of a couple.Pulled up very late in the afternoon, suffering from massive migraine and anxiety. They were just so helpful,getting me a chair and letting my dog play with theirs both Jack Russells.Highly recommend,amenities and grounds perfect.!!

We used this caravan park as a stopover.
Didn’t expect much, and didn’t get much.
Auto check in so zero personal touch.
Although $36 a little steep for facilities on offer, it served a purpose.

Needed a place to stay so we could attend a function in the area. A very neat smaller park by the Avon River. Well laid out with good sized grassed sites separated by hedgerows giving a sense of privacy.  Clean and tidy ammenities and well within walking distance to town. Excellent takeaway across the road. I would recommend this park and hope we can visit again.

We stayed here over Easter. The park was great. Toilets & showers were clean and maintained daily. The showers were bigger than usual. The park was mostly full.
Gardens & grass were very pretty & the owners went above & beyond to make sure everyone who wanted a fire pit was able to have one.

Stayed across the Easter break and used the park as a base to explore the area.A quiet park..apart from Easter with good size sites and small older but generally clean toilet/shower.
Camp kitchen is functional but not flash..bbq was worst I have seen.. appeared to be not cleaned for some time.
Easy walk to shops.

Beautiful caravan park, clean facilities, nice grassy spots, great location.
Really enjoyed toasting marshmallows by the fire each night!

We had an amazing first camping experience, thank you! The campsite is well-maintained, the toilets are clean, the grass is soft and comfortable, and the staff are genuinely friendly and welcoming. It’s also dog-friendly, and it was such a joy to see so many happy dogs around. Highly recommend!
Dog friendly, great size sites with clean facilities. Great location, walking distance to the river and shops. We'll definitely be back!
Great little stop over.  Small and friendly park beautifully situated by the Avon river.  Cute town and the local restaurant 'Taste of Avon' is EXELLENT.

Great little park  easy to find, picked our own site for the van, no-one about but a quick phone call and all was sorted.
Only there one night but the facilities were all clean and well looked after.
A nice tent area for bikepackers  and lots of shelter if its raining including a fully enclosed camp kitchen.
Fantastic caravan park with great amenities and very accommodating management.! Very fair site pricing , with good sized sites that are easily accessible! Will definitely be back!
The camping ground is lovely, bathroom is the best we ever experienced with toasty warm in cold weather!  Whole place was lovely & tidy
Great spot for caravans. Plenty of room and good facilities.
Amazing location, great facilities friendly and accommodating staff & reasonably priced

This is a lovely little caravan park. Right on the river.
We checked in very late and the manager was super accommodating and welcoming.
We had a powered site but the power did seem to keep tripping.
Small, old toilet block but everything worked well and was clean.

I arrived late (20:30 so night nearly) and the caretaker was kind enough to pop out and accept an unplanned booking.
I have van plus trailer. Site is not drive through.
Toilet block tiny but clean. Two showers. Two toilets. Shower was superb. Plenty of pressure and the water was hot.
Site has power and water and was priced well at $24 (Jan 2025).
Just behind the services block is a track that leads down to the Avon which suits me because I paddle. River is lovely. Site does not have a little shop, but is walking distance to the town where most of what you would need casually is available. Quiet location. Road noise in the background but not enough to keep any but the lightest sleepers awake. Has laundry and kitchen. Coming out of Bairnsdale towards Melbourne, it is the first and only rest stop with a toilet being why I stayed initially for one night but extended to three. Is small. Has a playground area. No kids when I was there and I am ok with that. Totally recommend.
Lovely experience all round.

Loved our holiday at this park. Pet friendly, great open grass spaces. The camp kitchen is big with indoor/outdoor dining, 2 large bbqs. Easy access to the river for swimming. Shower block is clean and tidy. Park is well maintained and management are very friendly and  happy to assist with any questions.
Will be visiting again.

Had a fabulous 5 day break on a powered site. Great amenities, kitchen and laundry facilities. Great management and easy to deal with. Local pool a hop skip and a jump away. Close to the shops and bakery. Overall a fabulous place and will be back again.

Great little park on the Avon River. Unpowered sites have a view of the river and are a bargain at only $20.00 per night. This was the last stay of our trip and after a shocker of an experience in Marlo at the mARLO caravan Park and motel, it was nice to finish off our holiday in such a beautiful setting in this clean, beautiful and well managed park. Will be back!
Only stayed one night very clean and tidy will definitely be back
Amazing staff new owners and great price highly recommend
Very friendly and helpful management, great spot defiantly recommend a visit on your next vacation !
Great little park right on the river. Large sites. Good amenities. Easy walk to pub etc.

We stayed at this park at the end of our 5 month trip to and from Nth Queensland in order to catch up with friends. I am not sure which park previous reviewers stayed at but this one does not have cabins or a pool!! |For a hefty $96 per night the park provided the minimum number of toilet and shower facilities that I observed being cleaned just once in our 5 night stay, a basic camp kitchen and BBQ's that were so filthy nobody would use them.|The parks base rate is $36 and peak $48 but over the Melb Cup weekend this was doubled and a 4 night minimum required. Price gouging at it s best!! When I enquired why our price was so high (considering others staying at the same time paid $48) , I was told pricing is 'dynamic' and there was no consideration given to refunding the overcharge. Would not recommend this park.

We booked to stay here over the long weekend of the Melbourne Cup. At $96 per night for a powered site - with a four-night booking minimum. HOWEVER when we arrived others had only paid $48 per night with no minimum which was very disappointing and price gouging at its finest. The toilet and bathroom facilities were not cleaned at all during our stay, and it was a struggle to get in and out of the toilets due to the size of the cubicles.

Such a shame as this little town offers so much but would never stay here or recommend to anyone!

A great little park with our experience spoilt by price gouging! We booked two powered sites for the Melbourne Cup weekend at $96 per night, minimum of four nights. HOWEVER when we arrived and spoke to others who were pulling up to many of the available sites they were charge $48!! This really tainted the experience and despite asking for a refund it was a case of too bad so sad! Would not recommend based on this.

What a beautiful park!
Friendly managers and so well maintained.
The manager is not a nice guy and is very arrogant and very rude raises his voice to customers
Neat and clean toilet

Nice clean and tidy caravan/camping park with the bonus of being able to bring your dog. Right on the Avon river with the town, the pool and great walks all quite literally right on your doorstep. Good facilities camp kitchen, bathrooms, laundry, powered sites etc

Stratford on the River Tourist Park that was a great fit for my family. The park has great spots for caravans and tents. There are also plenty of places to visit like the river, pump track, blue pool and local town. This caravan park is fantastic and we will be coming back.

Louise the owner was aggressive and rude. Told fully grown adults “it’s bed time” at 10pm on a long weekend around a fire and came with a bucket a water and aggressively threw it on the fire with kids around resulting in their eyes being burnt. We got the refund we asked for, park is dog friendly, but not people friendly. No wonder it was empty Aus day weekend.

Just got home from a 4 night stay. This caravan park is wonderful. Amenities impeccably clean and well looked after. Situated on the Avon river. Our powered site had great views of the river. Unfortunately we had a lot of rain and a minor flood warning whilst we were there but Louise (park owner) gave us much reassurance. Herself and her staff were extremely friendly and welcoming. It really felt like staying at a friends place.
Will definitely return.
Thank you team for providing a brilliant and hospitable service 🥰
quiet and beautiful park, really well set up for privacy and peace would recommend to everyone passing through!

We spent 3 weeks at Strathford Camping Park while working and we could t be happier. Even during a flooding event Louise (owner) was very reassuring and did her best to accommodate us. With the help of her team the campsite is very well looked after, the shower block is clean and comfortable, and the kitchen has everything you need to have a great dinner. Thanks for everything!
Great looking place

I've been here a couple of times now and really enjoyed the stay.
Very clean and quiet park right on the Avon river. Friendly host, affordable prices and a stone throw away from Sale.
Highly recommended 5 Star ⭐👍
We stayed here on our way to the Sapphire Coast. Great park & the amenities were some of the cleanest we have seen. We will be booking in again on our return journey.
Great position, welcoming hosts, tidy park, excellent camp kitchen and nice clean amenities.
Very thoughtfully made guests warm in the bathrooms and  camp kitchen. Clean and lovely park.

Recently my wife Maggie and I together with our much loved Cavalier spaniel ‘Danny Boy’ had the absolute pleasure to spend an overnight stay on two separate occasions at this beautiful park. The park contains cabins and excellent caravan sites. We ‘broke’ the road trip from Melbourne to Merimbula at ‘Riverside’ and loved it so much we stayed again on our return trip. On both occasions we were delighted to meet the owner/ operators Shaun & Louise who were most helpful and ‘caring’ hosts. The cabins were pre-warmed which was a very pleasant, thoughtful and an unexpected surprise. Some cabins have beautiful river views and fire pits are abundant around this immaculately maintained park. There is a playground, bike hire, access to a beautiful Town swimming pool and book exchange. All facilities including the cabins are ‘dog friendly’, lockable gates on the decks are a great advantage. The nearby and walking distance Avon Hotel is super and has a great bar and stunning meals are served in the bar or bistro. Stratford is a great little town and the Riverside Tourist Park is amazing, perhaps the best we have stayed in with either our caravan our in cabins. It is indeed a credit to Shaun & Louise. Thank you so much, Pete Maggie &’DB’

Amazing place!
Stayed here for 5 days, the area is beautiful, right on the Avon River with water access and a walking trail nearby.
The room was fantastic, has everything you need. The beds were so cozy it was hard to get up in the morning!
Highly recommend this place for anyone whos staying at Stratford.

As first time caravaners this park was FABULOUS, Louise at reception was wonderful, supa friendly & supa helpful and we could bring our old dog too, we will be back for sure, thankyou Mark and Haylie 🌻
